name: SVG Animation Demo
description: Demonstrates the new svgCanvas entity type with animated diagrams
author: ERB Team

scenes.title: Demo Complete
scenes.summary: You've seen the svgCanvas entity in action!
lessons: svgCanvas can render any SVG diagram
Animations are controlled via timeline skills
SVGs can be combined with actors and other entities
External SVG files are inlined during publish
